creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pkubaj
Date: Tue Jul 21 08:34:44 UTC 2020
New revision: 542727
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/542727

Log:
  audio/bjumblr-lv2: fix build on GCC architectures

  Require C++11 compiler because of -std=c++11.

  Include climits in FileChooser.hpp because of INT64_MAX (GCC doesn't do that by default).

  PR:		248134
  Approved by:	portmgr (blanket: build fix)
  MFH:		2020Q3 (blanket: build fix)

Changes:
  head/audio/bjumblr-lv2/Makefile
  head/audio/bjumblr-lv2/files/
  head/audio/bjumblr-lv2/files/patch-src_BWidgets_FileChooser.hpp
